title: Puzzle Forest - Easy Adventure
description: A gentle jigsaw puzzle adventure with 4x4 grids. Perfect for little hands!
author: Freya Stories

pages.text: Squirrel found a magical picture that got scrambled! Can you help fix it?

jigsawPuzzle.promptText: Swap the tiles to fix the picture!

pages.text: Another picture needs your help! The snowman got all jumbled up.
One last puzzle! You're doing amazing!
You solved all the puzzles! What a puzzle master you are!

localizedTitle.ja: パズルの森 - やさしい冒険
localizedTitle.zh: 拼图森林 - 简单冒险

localizedDescription.en: A gentle jigsaw puzzle adventure with 4x4 grids. Perfect for little hands!
localizedDescription.pl: Łagodna przygoda z puzzlami 4x4. Idealna dla małych rączek!
localizedDescription.es: Una suave aventura de rompecabezas con cuadrículas de 4x4. ¡Perfecta para manitas pequeñas!
localizedDescription.de: Ein sanftes Puzzle-Abenteuer mit 4x4-Gittern. Perfekt für kleine Hände!
localizedDescription.fr: Une douce aventure puzzle avec des grilles 4x4. Parfait pour les petites mains !
localizedDescription.it: Una dolce avventura puzzle con griglie 4x4. Perfetta per piccole mani!
localizedDescription.pt: Uma aventura suave de quebra-cabeça com grades 4x4. Perfeita para mãozinhas!
localizedDescription.ja: 4x4グリッドのやさしいジグソーパズル冒険。小さな手にぴったり！
localizedDescription.ar: مغامرة لغز لطيفة بشبكات 4×4. مثالية للأيدي الصغيرة!
localizedDescription.tr: 4x4 ızgaralı nazik bir yapboz macerası. Küçük eller için mükemmel!
localizedDescription.nl: Een zacht puzzelavontuur met 4x4-rasters. Perfect voor kleine handjes!
localizedDescription.da: Et blidt puslespilseventyr med 4x4 gitre. Perfekt til små hænder!
localizedDescription.la: Aenigma mite cum reticulis 4×4. Perfectum pro manibus parvis!
localizedDescription.zh: 一个温和的4x4拼图冒险。非常适合小手！
